mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courseware (owner_id, lesson_plan_id, disorder_type, ai_draft, content, storage_key, format, status) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{lessonPlanId}, #{disorderType}, #{aiDraft}, #{content}, #{storageKey}, #{format}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, lesson_plan_id, disorder_type, ai_draft, content, storage_key, format, status FROM courseware WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE courseware SET content = #{content}, ai_draft = #{aiDraft}, storage_key = #{storageKey}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
